smart_waste_platform.title: Smart Electronic Waste Management Platform
smart_waste_platform.description: Developing a digital platform that uses artificial intelligence and Internet of Things to track and manage electronic waste from source to recycling. The platform includes a user app for scheduling collection of used devices, a GPS tracking system for trucks, and a comprehensive database of electronic waste types and processing methods. It also provides analytical reports for companies and governments on the amount of waste recycled and environmental impact achieved.
smart_waste_platform.author: Dr. Sarah Al-Ahmad
smart_waste_platform.competitive_advantage: First comprehensive platform in the region that combines AI and IoT for electronic waste management
smart_waste_platform.market_potential: Electronic waste market in the region is estimated at $2.5 billion annually with expected 15% annual growth

resource_requirements.human: Team of 12 people: 4 developers, 2 AI engineers, 2 environmental specialists, 2 marketers, 2 administrators
resource_requirements.financial: $1.2 million for the first two years
resource_requirements.technical: Cloud servers, IoT sensors, mobile and web applications, GPS systems

ar_education_system.title: Interactive Educational System with Augmented Reality for Students with Special Needs
ar_education_system.description: Developing an educational platform that uses augmented reality technology to provide a customized educational experience for students with special needs. The system includes interactive 3D content, educational games designed specifically for each type of disability, and a student progress tracking system using artificial intelligence. It also provides tools for teachers to create custom content and monitor student performance.
ar_education_system.author: Mr. Mohammed Al-Zahrani
ar_education_system.competitive_advantage: First system in the region that combines augmented reality and AI to serve people with special needs
ar_education_system.market_potential: More than 500,000 students with special needs in the region, with growing government investment in inclusive education

resource_requirements.human: Team of 15 people: 5 developers, 3 special education specialists, 2 UX/UI designers, 2 AR engineers, 3 administrators
resource_requirements.technical: AR devices, AR development platform, cloud servers, interactive content development tools

agricultural_crowdfunding.title: Crowdfunding Platform for Sustainable Agricultural Projects
agricultural_crowdfunding.description: Creating a digital platform that connects small farmers with investors and those interested in sustainable agriculture. The platform allows farmers to showcase their sustainable agricultural projects and request funding, while investors can choose projects they want to support. The platform includes a transparent system for tracking fund usage, periodic reports on project progress, and a reward system for investors in the form of agricultural products or financial returns.
agricultural_crowdfunding.author: Dr. Fatima Al-Khalidi
agricultural_crowdfunding.competitive_advantage: First crowdfunding platform specialized in sustainable agriculture with transparent tracking system and in-kind rewards
agricultural_crowdfunding.market_potential: More than 100,000 small farmers in the region, with growing interest in sustainable investment

resource_requirements.human: Team of 10 people: 3 developers, 2 financial specialists, 2 agricultural engineers, 2 marketers, 1 legal
resource_requirements.technical: Web platform and mobile app, secure payment system, data analysis tools, content management system

elderly_care_robot.title: Smart Robot for Elderly Care at Home
elderly_care_robot.description: Developing a smart home robot specifically designed to help the elderly with their daily activities. The robot includes a smart voice assistant, health monitoring sensors, a robotic arm for assistance with simple tasks, and a reminder system for medications and appointments. It can also contact family members or emergency services when needed, and provides periodic health reports to treating physicians.
elderly_care_robot.author: Eng. Abdullah Al-Nuaimi
elderly_care_robot.competitive_advantage: Comprehensive robot designed specifically for Arabic culture with Arabic language support and local customs
elderly_care_robot.market_potential: Elderly population growing by 8% annually, with increasing demand for home care solutions

resource_requirements.human: Team of 18 people: 6 robotics engineers, 3 developers, 2 health specialists, 2 industrial designers, 3 technicians, 2 administrators
resource_requirements.financial: $2.5 million for the first three years
resource_requirements.technical: Advanced robotic components, medical sensors, smart processors, long-lasting batteries

energy_efficiency_app.title: Smart App for Improving Energy Efficiency in Buildings
energy_efficiency_app.description: Developing a smart app that uses artificial intelligence and Internet of Things to monitor and improve energy consumption in residential and commercial buildings. The app includes sensors to monitor temperature, humidity, and lighting, a smart control system for air conditioning and lighting, and detailed reports on energy consumption with suggestions for electricity savings. It also provides comparisons with similar buildings and a reward system for the most energy-efficient users.
energy_efficiency_app.author: Dr. Nora Al-Shammari
energy_efficiency_app.competitive_advantage: Comprehensive system that combines energy monitoring and smart control with easy-to-use Arabic interface
energy_efficiency_app.market_potential: Millions of buildings in the region with rising energy prices and increasing environmental awareness

resource_requirements.human: Team of 12 people: 4 developers, 2 electrical engineers, 2 AI engineers, 2 marketers, 2 technicians
resource_requirements.technical: IoT sensors, cloud platform, mobile applications, smart control systems

local_ecommerce.title: E-commerce Platform for Local and Handicraft Products
local_ecommerce.description: Creating an e-commerce platform specialized in selling local and traditional handicraft products. The platform aims to support local artisans and producers by providing an easy interface to showcase their products, a secure payment system, and reliable shipping services. The platform also includes an educational section to introduce consumers to the history and value of traditional crafts, and a rating and review system to ensure product quality.
local_ecommerce.author: Mr. Khalid Al-Balushi
local_ecommerce.competitive_advantage: Specialization in local products with cultural educational section and partnerships with local artisans
local_ecommerce.market_potential: E-commerce growth of 25% annually with increasing interest in local products

resource_requirements.human: Team of 8 people: 3 developers, 2 marketers, 1 designer, 1 logistics specialist, 1 administrator
resource_requirements.technical: E-commerce platform, payment system, mobile app, inventory management system

smart_traffic_system.title: Smart Traffic Management System for Cities
smart_traffic_system.description: Developing a comprehensive smart system for managing city traffic using artificial intelligence and big data analysis. The system includes smart cameras to monitor roads, sensors to measure traffic density, and algorithms to optimize traffic signals in real-time. It also provides an app for citizens to know the best routes and travel times, and a control panel for traffic authorities to monitor and manage the traffic network.
smart_traffic_system.author: Eng. Ahmed Al-Rashid
smart_traffic_system.competitive_advantage: Comprehensive system that combines traffic monitoring and smart control with citizen app
smart_traffic_system.market_potential: All major cities need smart traffic solutions, with massive government investments in smart cities

resource_requirements.human: Team of 20 people: 6 software engineers, 4 traffic engineers, 3 AI specialists, 3 technicians, 4 administrators
resource_requirements.financial: $3.2 million for the first four years
resource_requirements.technical: Smart cameras, sensors, high-performance servers, traffic signal control systems

digital_psychiatry_app.title: Digital Psychiatry App and Remote Therapy
digital_psychiatry_app.description: Developing a comprehensive mental health app that provides remote psychiatric therapy services in Arabic. The app includes video sessions with licensed psychiatrists, mental health assessment tools, interactive cognitive behavioral therapy programs, and a safe support community for patients. It also provides educational content about mental health and stress and anxiety management techniques, with complete privacy and confidentiality guarantees.
digital_psychiatry_app.author: Dr. Layla Al-Mansouri
digital_psychiatry_app.competitive_advantage: First comprehensive mental health app in Arabic with licensed doctors and culturally appropriate content
digital_psychiatry_app.market_potential: Growing awareness of mental health importance with shortage of available services, especially in remote areas

resource_requirements.human: Team of 16 people: 4 developers, 6 psychiatrists, 2 UX/UI designers, 2 security specialists, 2 administrators
resource_requirements.financial: $1.5 million for the first three years
resource_requirements.technical: Secure video platform, mobile applications, advanced encryption systems, secure cloud servers
